description:
The openssh-clients package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install openssh-clients
rationale:
This package includes utilities to make encrypted connections and transfer
files securely to SSH servers.
ocil_clause: the openssh-clients package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the openssh-clients package is installed: 
$ rpm -q openssh-clients
fixtext:
To remove the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package openssh-clients run the following command:

$ sudo dnf remove openssh-clients
srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must not have the openssh-clients package installed.

stig.srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must have the openssh-clients package installed.
stig.vuldiscussion: This package includes utilities to make encrypted connections and transfer files securely to SSH servers.
stig.checktext:
Verify that Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 has the openssh-clients package installed with the following command:

$ dnf list --installed openssh-clients

Example output:

openssh-clients.x86_64          8.7p1-8.el9

If the "openssh-clients" package is not installed, this is a finding.
stig.fixtext:
The openssh-clients package can be installed with the following command:

$ sudo dnf install openssh-clients

title: Install OpenSSH client software
